summary: Advanced project from the stale hook context to current state: c01 is the aligned NV; weak-pi pODMR supplied mw_freq_hz=3.8758666667 GHz; the FFT-aware Ramsey/T2star scout is running. During this wake I checked advice inbox/bridge status, recorded a Ramsey FFT expectation, waited for the first autosave, raw-exported and reviewed the one-average in-progress Ramsey data, generated review figures, updated work/state.md and log.md, and left the bridge job running. No T2star or 13C conclusion is claimed yet.

in_progress_review.summary: One stored average shows candidate Ramsey oscillation and expected-region FFT power, but it is not claim-grade for T2star or 13C.

next_action.expected_terminal_work: On completion, export the final savedexperiment, inspect raw/readout-aware Ramsey signal and per-average stability, run FFT on the actual tau grid, then assess T2star and 13C separately. If terminal data is non-claim-grade but tracking/counts are healthy, redesign a bounded Ramsey repeat using observed signal, drift, SNR, and FFT resolution.
